prompt: {"type":"anime character pose variation sheet","style":"ornate kawaii gothic-lolita fashion reference poster, predominantly pink monochrome line art with soft white background, delicate rose default=\"pink\"}","pieces":["rose-and-lace bonnet with floral clusters and veil-like trim","multi-tiered ruffled long-sleeve lolita dress with abundant lace, bows, pintucks, and frills","front apron-style panel and oversized waist bow at the back","frilly wrist cuffs","lace-trim socks","platform Mary Jane shoes with bows and straps"]},"theme":"{argument name=\"theme\" default=\"Strawberry & Rose Fantasy Kingdom\"}"},"layout":{"format":"vertical poster reference sheet with decorative floral corners and ornate title cartouche","title":"ポーズバリエーションシート","subtitle":"{argument name=\"subtitle text\" default=\"苺と薔薇の森内役の女の子\"}","center_name":"Aoi","main_sections":[{"title":"pose grid","position":"upper and middle area","count":8,"items":[{"label":"1 基本立ち","description":"front-facing neutral standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, full body visible"},{"label":"2 おじぎ","description":"formal bowing pose with upper body lowered and hands together in front"},{"label":"3 スカートつまみ","description":"curtsy-like pose holding out both sides of the skirt to show volume and ruffles"},{"label":"4 案内ポーズ","description":"presentation pose, one arm extended outward to the side, slightly raised, hands held near chest, startled mood"},{"label":"7 てれ","description":"bashful shy pose, head tilted, hand near face, knees angled inward"},{"label":"8 後ろ手","description":"three-quarter back view with hands behind the body, showing the back bow and rear silhouette"}]},{"title":"ポーズのポイント解説","position":"lower left skirt"},{"label":"エプロン・ポケット","description":"close-up of apron panel, bow, and decorative pocket charm details"},{"label":"靴・足元","description":"close-up of socks and platform shoes with bows and default=\"Aoi\"}","appearance":"年轻女孩，留着短波波头，大眼睛，柔和的娃娃脸，穿着以草莓和玫瑰为主题的精致甜美 Lolita 裙","outfit":{"color":"{argument name=\"outfit color\" default=\"粉色\"}","pieces":["带有花簇和面纱状饰边的玫瑰蕾丝发带","多层荷叶边长袖 Lolita 裙，配有丰富的蕾丝、蝴蝶结、褶皱和花边","前围裙式样板和背部超大蝴蝶结","花边袖口","蕾丝边短袜","带有蝴蝶结和绑带的厚底玛丽珍鞋"]},"theme":"{argument name=\"theme\" default=\"草莓与玫瑰梦幻王国\"}"},"layout":{"format":"带有装饰性花卉边角和华丽标题框的纵向海报参考图","title":"姿势变化参考图","subtitle":"{argument name=\"subtitle text\" default=\"草莓与玫瑰森林里的女孩\"}","center_name":"Aoi","main_sections":[{"title":"姿势网格","position":"上部和中部区域","count":8,"items":[{"label":"1 基本站姿","description":"正面中性站姿，双臂自然下垂，全身可见"},{"label":"2 行礼","description":"正式的鞠躬姿势，上半身前倾，双手在身前交叠"},{"label":"3 提裙","description":"类似屈膝礼的姿势，双手提起裙摆两侧以展示蓬松感和荷叶边"},{"label":"4 引导姿势","description":"展示姿势，一只手臂向侧面伸展，做出欢迎的手势"},{"label":"5 喜悦姿势","description":"充满活力的喜悦姿势，抬起一条腿，双臂高举，笑容灿烂"},{"label":"6 惊讶","description":"惊讶的姿势，肩膀微耸，双手靠近胸前，表现出受惊的情绪"},{"label":"7 害羞","description":"羞涩的姿势，头部倾斜，手靠近脸部，膝盖向内弯曲"},{"label":"8 背影","description":"四分之三背影，双手置于身后，展示背部蝴蝶结和后部轮廓"}]},{"title":"姿势要点解析","position":"左下侧条形区域","count":5,"items":[{"label":"重心平衡","description":"简单的身体平衡草图，带有中心线和重心分布说明"},{"label":"手部动作","description":"3 幅手部绘图，展示细腻的手腕和手指动作"},{"label":"裙摆展开","description":"裙摆展开示意图，强调圆形的蓬松感和层叠的荷叶边"},{"label":"蝴蝶结与花边动态","description":"蝴蝶结尾部和飘动花边的近景动态研究"},{"label":"脚部位置与步态示例","description":"3 种穿着高跟鞋站立和迈步的脚部位置示例"}]},{"title":"细节放大","position":"左下侧行","count":4,"items":[{"label":"手部特写","description":"袖口、蕾丝、丝带和手部姿势的特写"},{"label":"裙子层级","description":"裙子多层荷叶边和蕾丝的特写"},{"label":"围裙与口袋","description":"围裙面板、蝴蝶结和装饰性口袋挂饰细节的特写"},{"label":"鞋子与足部","description":"短袜和带有蝴蝶结绑带的厚底鞋特写"}]},{"title":"姿势设计备注","position":"右下侧方框","count":1,"items":[{"label":"备注栏","description":"在边框文本框内以段落形式书写的手写设计说明"}]},{"footer":"{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"草莓与玫瑰梦幻王国\"}"},"composition":"简洁的白色海报背景，所有绘图均采用统一的粉色线条渲染，带有淡淡的腮红红发色点缀，对称的装饰边框，顶部两侧角落有花簇，参考图布局清晰易读，全身角色绘图分布在 8 个带边框的面板中，底部配有说明性微型图和细节特写","quality":"高细节，清晰的精细线条，时尚设计图的清晰度，精致的可打印海报美学"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 粉色 Lolita 姿势变化参考图：此提示词可生成一张华丽的动漫角色参考海报，包含八种姿势变化、动作说明以及针对甜美哥特 Lolita 女孩设计的服装细节标注。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, close-up, full-body, grid, front-facing, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
